about.title: About
about.heading: About
about.description: This service allows regulators to manage their worklist items and organisations to manage their details and enrol in the EPR register.

regulator.title: Regulator
regulator.heading: Regulator Landing Page
regulator.description: This page is for regulators to manage their worklist items and view their details.

worklistItems.title: Worklist Items
worklistItems.heading: Worklist Items
worklistItems.description: This page is for regulators to view and manage their worklist items.

organisationList.title: Organisation List
organisationList.heading: Organisation List
organisationList.description: This page is for organisations to view their details and enrol in the EPR register.
